forgotPassword.subtitle: Password reset will be available here soon

statsPlaceholder.title: Your journey at a glance
statsPlaceholder.description: Soon you will track everything from here.

landing.heroTitle: Find the home that matches your pace.
landing.heroSubtitle: Boutique service for people looking for a property that fits their story. Local curation, flexible scheduling, honest conversation.

about.title: An agency that knows your neighborhood.
about.body: For over a decade we have brokered sales and rentals across the most sought-after parts of the city. We keep a small, carefully tended portfolio — choosing a home should feel calm, not rushed.

howItWorks.title: From the first coffee to the keys in hand.

discover.title: Discover
discover.body: We curate options aligned with what you are looking for and send a tailored shortlist — no inbox overload.

schedule.title: Visit
schedule.body: Book viewings on schedules that work for you. A senior broker accompanies every visit.

decide.title: Decide
decide.body: Full support through the proposal, paperwork and closing. Track each step from your dashboard.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.body: Tell us what you are looking for. We reply within one business day.
contact.address: Rua das Acácias, 245 — Jardim Paulista, São Paulo/SP
